subject: Castform in Normal Form, a small round white-lavender creature with an open-mouthed expression, floating in a cloudy sky
description: Castform's Normal Form is depicted as a small, almost perfectly round creature with a white and pale lavender body, a large circular head, and a surprised or cheerful open-mouthed expression. It floats freely in a blue-gray cloudy sky with soft cumulus cloud formations behind it. The creature appears light and buoyant, consistent with its weather-reactive nature. This is confirmed Normal Form by the white/lavender coloration — not blue (Rainy), orange (Sunny), or icy-white (Snowy). The card has a reverse holofoil treatment visible in the card frame.
foreground: Castform Normal Form floating, round white-lavender body, open-mouthed expression
background: Blue-gray cloudy sky with soft cumulus clouds
